name: Mobile Responsive UX - Late and Overtime Fields
description: Verify the payroll day editor shows late minutes and overtime hours fields clearly on mobile viewport, and overall responsive layout functions correctly

planSteps.description: Set browser viewport to 375x812 pixels (iPhone-like mobile size)
Verify the app loads and fits within the mobile viewport without horizontal scrolling
Click on the Payroll navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify the Payroll section is visible with month navigation showing current month title between previous and next arrow buttons
Verify the daily history card is visible and contains a table or list with date entries
Verify the day editor shows a 'Late Minutes' input field or label that is clearly readable on mobile
Verify the day editor shows an 'Overtime Hours' input field or label that is clearly readable on mobile
Verify the allowances editor section is visible below the day editor
Click on the Settings navigation button
Verify Settings cards stack vertically on mobile viewport (work location, shift thresholds, preferences, financial settings, deductions, vacation settings)
Click on the Dashboard navigation button
Verify the Dashboard timer, status card, quick actions grid, weekly summary, and vacation balance all fit within mobile viewport
